projects.title: Quantum Reservoir Computing
projects.description: Designed and implemented a quantum reservoir computing framework using resource-efficient feature maps for time-series forecasting on near-term hardware. Led to a publication and a pending WIPO patent.

projects.title: A Resource-Efficient Quantum Kernel
projects.description: Developed a quantum kernel method that reduces qubit and gate requirements while maintaining classification accuracy. Recognized with the NRC/Deep Tech Canada Student Award.

projects.title: Coherent Feed-Forward Quantum Neural Network
projects.description: Designed a novel coherent QNN architecture using feed-forward quantum circuits, enabling improved classification on near-term hardware.

projects.title: QML for Materials Discovery
projects.description: Applied classical and quantum active learning to accelerate discovery of metal-organic frameworks suitable for hydrogen storage applications.

projects.title: QML Hardware Benchmarking Pipelines
projects.description: Built benchmarking pipelines for evaluating QML algorithms under realistic hardware noise conditions, comparing against classical baselines.
projects.outcome: Internal research infrastructure at NRC / uOttawa
